name: Plastic Fillable Easter Eggs 6ct - Spritz™
description:
Add a touch of elegance to your Easter with the Plastic Fillable Easter Eggs 6ct - Spritz™. These charming eggs feature a solid-colored design, perfect for filling with treats, toys or surprises. Their sophisticated look makes them a delightful addition to any Easter celebration. Easy to open and close, they’re great for egg hunts and decorations.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
